narrative:
Mifflin-Combined township has 865 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.2 percentage points.
